name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'

postAttachCommand.server: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces/Capstone-project-on-fraud-detection && chmod +x watchdog_services.sh && if ! pgrep -f "watchdog_services.sh" >/dev/null; then nohup env API_PORT=5000 STREAMLIT_PORT=8501 API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5000 WATCHDOG_INTERVAL=5 ./watchdog_services.sh >/workspaces/Capstone-project-on-fraud-detection/watchdog.log 2>&1 & fi'
